title: Lo' #3819
definition:
Lo-ruhamah = "no mercy"

 1) (Pual) symbolic name given by the prophet Hosea to his daughter
nasbUsage:
Definition: Lo-ruhamah = "no mercy"

 1) (Pual) symbolic name given by the prophet Hosea to his daughter

    NASB:  without compassion, symbolic name of Hoseas daughter
